steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks which choice best emphasizes when she collected both samples. The answer must highlight the timing of both collections, not location, significance, or any other detail.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — one date only: mentions only one collection date, leaving the second collection's timing unaddressed. ✗
  • Choice B — November 1926 and February 1930: gives both collection dates and links them with 'after' to show their chronological relationship. ✓
  • Choice C — omits dates: focuses on location or significance rather than timing. ✗
  • Choice D — current location: describes where the samples are now, not when they were collected. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
